title: oxalis monophylla var. minor
intro: Oxalis monophylla var. minor, also known as the small-flowered wood-sorrel, is a variety of the Oxalis monophylla plant, which is a perennial herb belonging to the Oxalidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood sugar levels and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Oxalis monophylla var. minor include its ability to help with digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea or used in tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
